title: OTP Screen - Verify auto-focus shift between OTP input fields
description: Tests that the focus automatically moves to the next input box after a digit is entered.
preconditions: User is on the OTP screen.

steps.description: 1. Tap the first OTP input box.
3. Verify the focus automatically shifts to the second input box.
5. Verify the focus automatically shifts to the third input box.

expected_result: The input cursor focus moves sequentially from one OTP box to the next as the user types.
